text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho doesn't feel well, so I take her to
the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You worry too much! What are you, my dad? Ah
well. I'll take a break if it'll make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Familiar! Next up is summoning class! ♪ Let's
get moving!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Uh, Familiar? Why aren't you answering?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the heck's going on?! Why are there so
many of you?!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? A
text_block_list.text:
You're such a good girl, working so hard today!
I'm going to prepare an amazing treat for you!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? A
text_block_list.text:
You're such a good girl, working so hard today!
I'm going to prepare an amazing treat for you!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? B
text_block_list.text:
Don't be fooled, Sweep! Getting babied doesn't
help your training!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? B
text_block_list.text:
Don't be fooled, Sweep! Getting babied doesn't
help your training!

text_block_list.name: Familiars?
text_block_list.text:
Training is more important than magic lessons!
I sense inspiration on the horizon today!
Wow! Sweep! Amazing! Genius!

text_block_list.name: Familiars?
text_block_list.text:
Training is more important than magic lessons!
I sense inspiration on the horizon today!
Wow! Sweep! Amazing! Genius!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Will you all shut up?! Where's my real familiar?!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? A
text_block_list.text: I'm the real one! Now, about that treat—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I said shut up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You think I'm gonna believe any of you are my
familiar?! Don't be stupid! I can tell the difference
between my familiar and clowns like you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First of all, you! What part of you is supposed to
feel real?! My familiar isn't all clingy and doesn't
try to butter me up!

text_block_list.name: Familiar? A
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You, you, and you are all fake too! My familiar
doesn't force me to do what they say! My familiar
doesn't look down on my magic! And my familiar
doesn't talk like that!

text_block_list.name: Familiars?
text_block_list.text:
You noticed!
Damn!
Witch! Magic! Wow!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Well, look who it is! The real deal!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! You're a pain even in my dreams, you
know that? Useless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho wakes up looking strangely proud
of herself. I guess she's feeling better!

text_block_list.name: Familiars?
text_block_list.text:
That's Sweep for you!
Forget about that! Let's hurry up and train!
Amazing, Sweep! Genius!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a sec! Stop pushing me! You're gonna
crush me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! If you're gonna show up in my dreams, then
you better do it right! Or you better believe
you're gonna hear about it otherwise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho runs into my office looking
incredibly upset. I guess she didn't get much rest
because of her dreams.
